title: Austin, Texas
html:
Austin is Yahir's current city — the first real exit from Oregon — since mid-September 2025 (per Memory). It's the staging ground for everything happening now: the Rankett build, the overnight gym shift, bridge income strategies, and the daily fight to keep both alive on no buffer.

The decision to move is visible in the run-up. The May 2025 todos (2025 05 30 todos) are a 10-month rolling list dominated by Austin logistics — "decide on official move day, apply to apartments, figure out how to get remaining things from Corvallis" — alongside the Brotein grind and an ISSA personal-trainer certification (issa cpt) that reads like the Planet Fitness gym-job bridge. The 2025 03 01 peacock bar incident six months earlier in Grants Pass is plausibly part of the push factor — Grants Pass becoming a place to leave.

The arrival itself is documented in 2025 09 23 how im scraping by, a P&L-shaped bullet list of the first weeks: barber-school haircuts, $1.50/lb chicken thighs, FB Marketplace deals, Whole Foods / HEB eating tactics, DoorDash for cushion, Planet Fitness $15/mo, food stamps applied. The note's tone is unmistakable: "I just got mad at myself mentally for spending $5.50 on a blended Horchata. I'm seriously making it out the mud." And: "I am so fucking broke I needed to change my oil for $55 dollars and I know that's going to fuck me." This is the city where Yahir is testing whether the voluntary adversity philosophy he wrote in 2022 (2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream) can survive contact with rent.

By January 2026 (2026 01 13 rankett com, 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide) the Austin-based work is the ai search optimization meetup-prep — Yahir is now operating as a category founder pitching agencies a $998/seat white-label product while still working overnights. Austin holds both halves at once: founder bravado and the homeless guy at Whole Foods who Yahir sat next to.

  • 2025 09 23 how im scraping by — first month, ground truth
